settings.text:
At Indus Source Books we are passionate about books and committed to publishing quality and relevant literature. Our books comprise excellently researched content, processed with high quality editing. We publish, on average, twelve books a year, and all our publications are given the focus they are entitled to. Our books are created with pride, thought, and great attention to detail.


Indus Source Books publishes in the areas of Spirituality, Health, History/Politics, Business, Self-Help, and General Non-fiction. If your manuscript relates to any of these subjects send us a proposal to editor.indussource@gmail.com with the title of your manuscript in the subject line.
